hooks.command: bash hooks/block-bash-vcs.sh; c=$?; if [ "$c" = "127" ]; then echo 'HOOK SCRIPT MISSING: hooks/block-bash-vcs.sh -- enforcement offline. Run /sync-template to restore hooks/.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit $c

bash hooks/pre-commit-test.sh; c=$?; if [ "$c" = "127" ]; then echo 'HOOK SCRIPT MISSING: hooks/pre-commit-test.sh -- enforcement offline. Run /sync-template to restore hooks/.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit $c
bash hooks/no-push-main.sh; c=$?; if [ "$c" = "127" ]; then echo 'HOOK SCRIPT MISSING: hooks/no-push-main.sh -- enforcement offline. Run /sync-template to restore hooks/.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit $c

bash hooks/gate-before-merge.sh; c=$?; if [ "$c" = "127" ]; then echo 'HOOK SCRIPT MISSING: hooks/gate-before-merge.sh -- enforcement offline. Run /sync-template to restore hooks/.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit $c

bash hooks/tier-before-coder.sh; c=$?; if [ "$c" = "127" ]; then echo 'HOOK SCRIPT MISSING: hooks/tier-before-coder.sh -- enforcement offline. Run /sync-template to restore hooks/.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit $c

bash hooks/require-skills-block.sh; c=$?; if [ "$c" = "127" ]; then echo 'HOOK SCRIPT MISSING: hooks/require-skills-block.sh -- enforcement offline. Run /sync-template to restore hooks/.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit $c
echo 'PIPELINE: Agent finished. Review workstream status and advance if ready.'

echo '=== PRE-COMPACTION STATE ===' && (cat docs/plans/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -50 || echo 'No plan files') && echo '---' && (git worktree list 2>/dev/null || true) && echo '---' && (git branch --sort=-committerdate 2>/dev/null | head -10 || true)
